announce.wave_motion_gun_mod.circuit_ope: Circuit to Wave Motion Gun: open

Forced injector confirmed.

Chamber pressure
rising to firing point
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g1.s1.q1:
<D> A messenger from afar asks you, friend of the blue planet:
For what purpose will you use this power?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g1.s1.q2:
<D> Power comes with responsibility.
Are you prepared to bear it?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g1.s1.q3:
<D> We will soon send supplies near your location.
Are you ready to retrieve them right away?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g1.s1.q4:
<D> You will receive a datapad showing the approximate drop point.
What will you do once you arrive there?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g1.s1.q4.o2: Climb somewhere high and watch the sky
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g1.s1.q5:
<D> Through the questions to come, we shall judge
whether you are worthy. Until we meet again.
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g1.s2.q1:
<D> Into which block should you feed the energy
required to fire the Wave Motion Gun?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g1.s2.q2:
<D> As you increase range and power,
what happens to the energy cost per shot?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g1.s2.q3:
<D> If the stored energy is less than the firing cost,
what happens?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g1.s2.q4:
<D> After firing, there is a cooldown before the next shot.
Why?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g1.s2.q4.o1: It needs to vent heat (cool down)
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g1.s2.q5:
<D> Which resource does operating the Wave Motion Gun
consume the most?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g1.s3.q1:
<D> How does the Wave Motion Gun's beam
handle obstacles in its path?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g1.s3.q2:
<D> Which item should you carry to track
the supply drop coordinates?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g1.s3.q3:
<D> If you accidentally fire the Wave Motion Gun toward your base,
what is most likely to happen?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g1.s3.q4:
<D> What happens if you try to fire
with part of the structure missing?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g1.s3.q5: <D> What is the proper target for this weapon?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s1.q1:
<C> Now, on to assembling the Wave Motion Gun.
What is the correct order of blocks?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s1.q2:
<C> In the multiblock layout, what placement rule
applies to every block?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s1.q2.o1: Place them in a straight line
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s1.q3:
<C> Barrels can be omitted entirely, but how many
will be recognized at most?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s1.q4:
<C> Which block must always sit at the very rear
of the Wave Motion Gun system?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s1.q5:
<C> The gun's range and blast radius are determined
mainly by the count of which block?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s2.q1:
<C> During charging, can you keep filling
beyond 100%%?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s2.q2:
<C> What happens when you enable the DESTRUCTIVE setting
on the Control Panel?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s2.q3:
<C> What is the main benefit of deliberately setting
a smaller range and radius?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s2.q4:
<C> The lamp on the Targeting Scope is blinking.
What does this indicate?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s2.q5: <C> When the Wave Motion Gun fires, where should you be?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s2.q5.o1: Right in front of the muzzle
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s3.q1:
<C> When lifting with a lever, what happens as you push
farther from the fulcrum?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s3.q2:
<C> A spring stretches when you hang a weight on it.
Double the weight — how much does it stretch?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s3.q3:
<C> A roller coaster loops the loop on the momentum of its drop.
Which energy makes this possible?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s3.q4:
<C> Bicycle brakes rely on a force that resists motion.
What is it called?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s3.q5: <C> What happens when you bring the north poles of two magnets together?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s4.q1:
<C> What flows out of a battery's positive terminal
toward the negative one?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s4.q2:
<C> Connect two bulbs in series.
Compared to one bulb, their brightness is...
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s4.q4:
<C> Lightning is a discharge of what,
built up inside clouds?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s4.q5: <C> Which direction does a compass needle's N pole point?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s5.q1: <C> Why is there a delay between seeing lightning and hearing thunder?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s5.q2:
<C> Look at yourself in a mirror.
Your right hand appears as which?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s5.q3:
<C> A prism splits light into seven colors.
What do you see in the sky after rain?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s5.q4:
<C> Touch a speaker while it plays sound.
What is it doing?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g2.s5.q5:
<C> Mix all three primary colors of light (red, green, blue).
What color do you get?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s1.q1:
<B> On to the upgrade units. Which optional device
amplifies the gun's power and raises its damage?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s1.q2:
<B> Which optional device is needed to change
the color of the energy wave?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s1.q3:
<B> Which optional device is required
to enable terrain destruction?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s1.q4:
<B> Optional units can be installed in multiples.
Where do they belong?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s1.q4.o1: Between the barrel and the engine
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s1.q5:
<B> How many damage-boosting Tachyon Accelerators
can one system accept at most?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s2.q1:
<B> Which is the largest planet in the Solar System,
famous for its striped bands?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s2.q2:
<B> Known as the morning star and the evening star,
which planet is Earth's neighbor?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s2.q3:
<B> Saturn's grand, beautiful rings —
what are they made of?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s2.q4: <B> On which planet of the Solar System does humanity live?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s2.q5: <B> Which planet is closest to the Sun?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s3.q1:
<B> The Moon circles the Earth.
Why does it appear to shine?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s3.q2: <B> The Moon's gravity is about what fraction of Earth's?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s3.q3: <B> What is the main cause of ocean tides?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s3.q4:
<B> What do we call the phenomenon
where the Moon hides the Sun?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s3.q5:
<B> In the Apollo program, which body
did humans first set foot on?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s4.q1:
<B> What happens if you step into the vacuum of space
without a space suit?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s4.q2: <B> Why can't you hear sound in space?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s4.q2.o2: There is no air to carry the sound
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s4.q3: <B> Why is it weightless inside a space station?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s4.q3.o2: It keeps falling as it circles the Earth
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s4.q4: <B> Roughly how long does sunlight take to reach Earth?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s4.q5: <B> Why do shooting stars glow in the atmosphere?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s4.q5.o2: Friction with the air heats them up
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s5.q1:
<B> How can a rocket fly in the vacuum of space?
(The law of action and reaction)
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s5.q2:
<B> How fast must a rocket go to break free of
Earth's gravity and reach space?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s5.q3: <B> Why can a satellite keep circling the Earth?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s5.q4: <B> Why do most rockets jettison parts after launch?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s5.q5: <B> Where is Japan's Tanegashima Space Center located?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s6.q1:
<B> Which star in the northern sky barely moves
as the hours pass?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s6.q2:
<B> The Earth spins around once a day.
What is this motion called?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s6.q3:
<B> The Earth circles the Sun once a year.
What is this motion called?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s6.q4:
<B> What is the Milky Way,
seen in the summer night sky?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g3.s6.q5:
<B> Which iconic winter constellation has three stars
lined up at its center?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s1.q1:
<A> Now, the firing sequence. When using the remote
Targeting Scope, which value must first match the main unit?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s1.q2:
<A> Which control do you operate
to begin charging energy?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s1.q3:
<A> To pause the energy feed and hold
the current charge, you should...
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s1.q3.o2: Press the switch beside FORCED INJECTOR
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s1.q4:
<A> The cross gauge display is dim.
Where do you adjust its brightness?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s1.q5:
<A> To abort the charge and vent the energy,
what should you do?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s1.q5.o3: Pull the FORCED INJECTOR lever down
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s2.q1:
<A> Stars shine in different colors.
Which is hotter: a blue-white star or a red star?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s2.q2:
<A> When a very massive star dies, it triggers one of the
biggest explosions in the universe, called a...
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s2.q3:
<A> A Sun-like star sheds its gas at the end of its life,
leaving a small white remnant called a...
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s2.q4:
<A> Where are new stars born —
the place called a stellar nursery?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s2.q5:
<A> For roughly how much longer
is the Sun expected to keep shining?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s3.q1:
<A> What do we call the dark object whose gravity is so strong
that not even light can escape?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s3.q2:
<A> What is the boundary of no return
around a black hole called?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s3.q3:
<A> What is said to happen to your body
if you fall into a black hole?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s3.q4:
<A> The point of infinite density thought to lie
at a black hole's center is the...
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s3.q5:
<A> When two black holes merge,
what kind of waves ripple outward?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s4.q1:
<A> What do we call the great explosion
said to have begun the universe?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s4.q2: <A> What is the universe believed to be doing right now?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s4.q3: <A> Which galaxy contains our Solar System?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s4.q4: <A> Roughly how old is the universe?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s4.q5:
<A> What is the invisible, mysterious matter
filling the universe called?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s5.q1: <A> How many times could light circle the Earth in one second?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s5.q3:
<A> A receding ambulance sounds lower in pitch.
What is this effect called?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s5.q4:
<A> Which device concentrates light into a single point
of intense energy?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s5.q5:
<A> When a space telescope observes a distant star,
which version of the star is it seeing?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s6.q1: <A> What are the smallest particles that make up matter called?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s6.q2:
<A> Keep heating matter through solid → liquid → gas.
What state comes next?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s6.q3:
<A> What is absolute zero,
the lowest temperature theoretically possible?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s6.q4: <A> Which reaction is the Sun's source of energy?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g4.s6.q5:
<A> A sugar cube of it would weigh hundreds of millions of tons.
Which ultra-dense star is this?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s1.q1:
<S> The ultimate weapon — the Wave Motion Gun.
What must you never forget when pulling its trigger?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s1.q2:
<S> Immense energy, converged on a single point and released.
What do we call that instant of radiance?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s1.q3: <S> What does the advance of science bring us?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s1.q4: <S> Why do you build a Wave Motion Gun in this world?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s1.q5:
<S> The final question.
The thing we lack and you possess —
the driving force behind it all. What is it?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s2.q1:
<S> Einstein predicted that the faster you move,
the slower time passes. Which theory is this?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s2.q2:
<S> The famous equation E=mc².
It states that energy is equivalent to what?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s2.q3: <S> Near a massive star, how does time flow?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s2.q4: <S> What is it called when gravity bends the path of light?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s2.q5: <S> Can information be sent faster than light?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s3.q1:
<S> Light has the nature of a wave —
and of what else?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s3.q2:
<S> A cat in a box is neither alive nor dead until you open it —
which famous thought experiment is this?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s3.q3:
<S> Two distant particles appear to share information instantly.
What is this phenomenon?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s3.q4:
<S> A particle slips through a barrier
as if passing through a wall. This is called...
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s3.q5:
<S> The future is decided only by probabilities —
which way of thinking is this?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s4.q1:
<S> Warping space to reach a distant place in an instant
is called...
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s4.q2:
<S> Go back in time and kill your parent, and you are never born.
Which paradox is this?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s4.q3:
<S> Remaking Mars or another world so people can live there
like on Earth is called...
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s4.q4:
<S> A future transport linking the ground to a space station
by cable is a...
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s4.q5:
<S> A megastructure enclosing the entire Sun
to harvest its energy is a...
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s5.q1:
<S> Which particle, said to travel faster than light,
is used in the Wave Motion Gun?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s5.q2:
<S> Which device is needed to accelerate
wave motion energy?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s5.q3:
<S> Which blue-shining ore forms
the housing of the Wave Motion Gun?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s5.q4:
<S> In warp navigation, what happens to the space
around the ship?
quiz.wave_motion_gun_mod.g5.s5.q5: <S> What singular property does the Tachyon Crystal possess?

advancement.wave_motion_gun_mod.first_co: Make first contact with the messenger from afar
advancement.wave_motion_gun_mod.first_qu: Pass the engineer certification exam and earn the right to request supplies
advancement.wave_motion_gun_mod.first_su: Obtain a coordinate datapad and receive your first supply drop

Obtain Clearance B. Blueprints for the wave cannon's main sections are declassified
Obtain Clearance A. Amplifier and special shell blueprints are declassified
Obtain Clearance S. Construction of the wave cannon muzzle is authorized
advancement.wave_motion_gun_mod.wave_cor: Gather a quantum unit and a wave core, the heart of the engine
advancement.wave_motion_gun_mod.structur: Confirm the completed wave cannon structure on the monitoring unit
advancement.wave_motion_gun_mod.full_cha: Complete charging the energy required to fire the wave motion gun
advancement.wave_motion_gun_mod.overchar: Push past the safety limit into an overcharged state
advancement.wave_motion_gun_mod.fire_wav: Brace for shock and flash. Successfully fire the wave motion gun
advancement.wave_motion_gun_mod.wave_dea: Be swallowed by the extra dimension unleashed by your own wave motion gun
advancement.wave_motion_gun_mod.overheat: Push the wave energy engine into overheat
Pass a certification quiz generated by an AI
advancement.wave_motion_gun_mod.destruct: Fire the wave motion gun in destructive mode
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.title: Wave Motion Gun Manual
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p1.title: Chapter I: The Wave Motion Gun
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p1.body:
The Wave Motion Gun is a super-heavy weapon that turns the output of a dimensional wave engine directly into firepower. It draws vast energy from subspace - the extra dimensions folded into our universe - and focuses it to a single point together with tachyon particles.
At the point of impact the compressed extra dimensions unfold at once, tearing all matter into the gap between dimensions. The trigger of this cannon carries the weight of a world's fate.
This manual is your guide to its construction and operation. Keep it with you at all times.
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p2.title: Chapter II: Supply and Clearance
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p2.body:
For materials, summon "the Lady" with a Communication Beacon and pass her exam to receive supplies.
The higher your clearance rank, the more advanced the materials supplied.
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p3.title: Chapter III: Overall Layout
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p3.body:
The cannon connects in a straight line. From the front backward, place muzzle → barrels → modulators/amplifiers → Wave Motion Engine along one axis (up to 10 modulator/amplifier blocks in the row).
Place the Control Panel next to the engine and operate it remotely with a Targeting Scope on the same frequency.
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p4.title: Chapter IV: Wave Motion Gun Muzzle
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p4.body:
Count: 1 (required)
The front end of the whole structure. The beam fires from here, and the block's facing sets the firing direction.
If the structure is not connected correctly, firing is refused.
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p5.title: Chapter V: Wave Motion Gun Barrel
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p5.body:
Count: 0-6 (optional)
Connects right behind the muzzle. Each barrel raises the range limit by 50 m (10 m with none).
The radius limit also grows to "barrels x 3 + 2 m". More barrels shoot farther and wider.
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p6.title: Chapter VI: Modulators
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p6.body:
Wavelength Adjuster - Count: 0-1 (optional)
Modulates the beam colors (core/shell) to the colors set on the Control Panel. Without it, colors stay standard.
Wave Motion Chamber - Count: 0-1 (optional)
Unlocks terrain-destruction mode. Without it, the destruction setting is ignored.
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p7.title: Chapter VII: Amplifiers
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p7.body:
Wave Motion Gun Tachyon Accelerator - Count: 0-2 (optional)
Raises the power limit.
0 units: power 10 / 1 unit: power 50 / 2 units: power 100
Placing three or more has no effect beyond two.
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p8.title: Chapter VIII: Wave Motion Engine
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p8.body:
Wave Motion Engine - Count: 1 (required)
The heart, placed at the end of the line. Capacity 150,000,000 FE, intake 150,000 FE per tick.
Firing cost = range x radius^2 x 150 + 107,000,000 FE
Charge at least the cost to fire. Overcharging up to 120%% boosts range and radius by that ratio.
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p9.title: Chapter IX: Control Panel
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p9.body:
Count: 1 (adjacent to the Wave Motion Engine, required)
Frequency: the comm frequency. SET it to match the Targeting Scope.
Range/Radius: firing range and blast radius. Limits depend on barrel count.
Damage: beam power. Limit depends on accelerator count.
Beam Colors: beam colors (hex). Requires the Wavelength Adjuster.
Destructive Mode: terrain destruction. Requires the Wave Motion Chamber.
Safety Release: releases the firing safety - the beam keeps flying into unloaded, distant terrain.
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p10.title: Chapter X: Trigger (1) - Charging
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p10.body:
Targeting Scope - Count: 1 (anywhere in reach). Safest operated from an Anti-Shock Seat (0+, optional).
FREQ.: sets the target frequency. Match the Control Panel.
Circuit to WMG: opens the circuit from the engine to the cannon.
SAFETY Inlet/Outlet: intake/exhaust safety valves.
FORCED INJECTOR (lever): raise to start charging, lower to vent.
Regulator switch: status reads Off / Active / Regulated. Off = venting, Active = charging, Regulated = holding the charge. Flip on to hold; auto-holds at 120%%.
Emergency Valves: emergency vent valves.
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p11.title: Chapter XI: Trigger (2) - Firing
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p11.body:
SAFETY Trigger: the firing safety. FIRE only becomes active once released.
Lock: posture lock. Firing is possible only while locked.
FIRE: starts the firing sequence.
Vertical slider: adjusts the cross-gauge sight brightness.
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p12.title: Chapter XII: Firing Sequence
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.p12.body:
1. Match FREQ. and open the Circuit.
2. Start charging with the injector lever (auto-hold at 120%%).
3. Release the Trigger safety and set the Lock.
4. FIRE. After the countdown, the gun fires.
Caution: after firing, the Wave Motion Engine overheats for 70 seconds. Leaving a charge idle for 60 seconds also overheats and force-vents it.
advancement.wave_motion_gun_mod.get_manu: Etch your knowledge into cosmo steel and compile the Wave Motion Gun Manual
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.shock.title: Shock Cannon Manual
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.shock.p1.body:
The Shock Cannon - formally the positron shock cannon - is a rapid-fire gun that fires focused positron beams and various physical shells. Using no wave energy, it needs no engine charge: load it and it is ready.
For base defense and ground suppression, everyday gunnery is well served by this cannon. This manual is your guide to its construction and operation.
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.shock.p2.body:
A simple structure of turret and barrels only. Along the turret's facing axis, connect barrels in a straight line forward or backward.
The side with barrels becomes the firing direction (rear takes priority if both). Control is done directly from the turret's console.
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.shock.p3.body:
Count: 1 (required)
The main body. Right-click to open the console for loading, firing, and settings.
It can also be fired by a redstone signal (fires on the rising edge). Combine with pressure plates or observers to build automated turrets.
Firing is refused while the muzzle is obstructed.
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.shock.p4.body:
Count: 1-6 (required)
Connect in a straight line on the turret's axis. The tip of the last barrel is the muzzle.
Firing is impossible with no barrel, or with seven or more.
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.shock.p5.body:
The loading slot accepts three shell types.
Shock Cannon Shell: the standard round, firing a positron beam. Range 150 m, blast radius 5 m, power 25. Beam color follows the color switches.
Type-3 Shell: a 4 m-radius explosion on impact (breaks terrain), power 20.
Wave Motion Cartridge: a 40 m-radius blast that vaporizes the area on impact. Handle with care.
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.shock.p6.body:
Slot: load ammunition.
FIRE: fires (starts the countdown if a delay is set). A redstone signal into the turret fires it just the same.
Color switches (green/red/blue): change the Shock Cannon Shell beam color.
Delay (tick): sets the firing delay (0-1200 ticks). The gun fires that long after FIRE is pressed.
manual.wave_motion_gun_mod.shock.p7.body:
1. Load ammunition.
2. Set color and Delay as needed.
3. FIRE (or apply a redstone signal).
A 3-second cooldown follows every shot. A delayed shot is cancelled if the ammo runs out or the muzzle becomes obstructed while waiting.
The Wave Motion Cartridge erases terrain over a wide area at the impact point. Never fire it toward friendly positions.
advancement.wave_motion_gun_mod.get_shoc: Bind your knowledge of raw cosmo ore into the Shock Cannon Manual
